source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis via FRED ({ABBR}RQGSP, {ABBR}POP)
notes: Target panel: 2001Q1-2025Q4. Reaches 2001Q1: no. Real GDP in millions of chained 2017 dollars divided by annual population (thousands × 1000 from FRED POP). Annual population is merged to all quarters in the same year; latest available population is forward-filled within each state when missing. FRED {ABBR}RQGSP typically begins 2005Q1; earlier quarters are not fabricated. margin_of_error: BEA does not publish sampling margins of error for state GDP; column is blank.

source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis via FRED ({ABBR}OPCI or {ABBR}OTOT/POP)
notes: Target panel: 2001Q1-2025Q4. Reaches 2001Q1: yes. Primary FRED {ABBR}OPCI for AR and IL from 2010 onward; OTOT/POP for 2001–2009 and for all other states across the panel. Annual population merged to quarters; forward-filled within state when missing. margin_of_error: BEA does not publish sampling margins of error for state personal income; column is blank.

source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics LAUS via FRED ({ABBR}UR)
notes: Target panel: 2001M1-2025M12. Reaches 2001M1: yes. Statewide unemployment rate via Scrapling/FRED CSV ({ABBR}UR). 2025M10 was blank in the FRED download for all 27 states; values were linearly interpolated from adjacent months (September and November 2025). 2026 observations excluded. margin_of_error: 90% confidence interval half-width from BLS lanrderr.xlsx (latest LAUS release), scaled to each month's rate as rate × (ref_moe / ref_rate); units are percentage points.

source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics LAUS via FRED ({ABBR}UR)
seasonal_adjustment: seasonally adjusted (average of monthly SA rates)
notes: Target panel: 2001Q1-2025Q4. Reaches 2001Q1: yes. Arithmetic mean of three monthly unemployment rates; complete quarters only. Includes 2025Q4 using interpolated 2025M10 (see monthly notes). margin_of_error: mean of the three monthly margins of error in each quarter (percentage points).

source: U.S. Census Bureau Housing Vacancy Survey, Table 3
units: percent of occupied housing units owner-occupied
notes: Target panel: 2001Q1-2025Q4. Reaches 2001Q1: no. Parsed from local file tab3_state05_2026_hmr.xlsx; includes all years present in the Census file (earliest available ~2006). 2026Q1 excluded. margin_of_error: Census HVS Table 3 published margin of error (percentage points, 90% confidence level).
